# Marc Friedman — Web Designer & Full Stack Developer

> Award-winning freelance web designer and full stack developer based in Tel Aviv, Israel. Specializing in high-performance websites, SaaS platforms, and AI-integrated digital experiences that turn attention into revenue.

## About

Marc Friedman is a freelance website designer and full stack developer operating as a dedicated web design agency. With 6+ years of experience and 50+ projects completed across three continents, Marc works directly with clients — no middlemen, no interns. He has pitched 5 VCs and was accepted into the AWS Accelerator program.

- Location: Tel Aviv, Israel
- Website: https://www.marcfriedmanportfolio.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/portfolio2/
- Behance: https://www.behance.net/marcfriedmanweb
- Clutch: https://clutch.co/profile/marc-friedman-design-agency
- DesignRush: https://www.designrush.com/agency/profile/marc-friedman
- Google Business: https://g.co/kgs/78fRZ6r
- Book a Free Strategy Call: https://calendly.com/marc-friedman-web-design--meeting-link/30min

## Services

- Custom Web Design & Development
- UI/UX Design & Design Systems
- SaaS & Web Application Development
- Startup MVP Development (launch in 30 days)
- AI Integration (OpenAI, Google Cloud AI, AWS SageMaker)
- Cybersecurity Assessment & Secure Development
- E-commerce (Shopify, custom solutions)
- SEO & Performance Optimization
- Fractional CMO Partnership (white-label execution for agencies)
- External Web Department (multi-location & franchise businesses)
- Monthly Website Retainer & Management
- UX/UI Mentorship & Tutoring
- Non-Profit / NGO Impact Story Sites

## Tech Stack

React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Cloudflare, Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Cloudinary, Shopify, Mapbox GL, HubSpot, Salesforce, Stripe, Calendly, Figma, Google Analytics 4

## Industries Served

Media & Entertainment, SaaS & Technology, E-commerce, Automotive, Professional Services, Social Impact & NGOs, Sports & Entertainment, Healthcare, Real Estate, Law Firms, Multi-location & Franchise Businesses, Education

## Notable Client Results

- Paving Leads: Ranked #1 on Google, 300% increase in organic traffic
- Untapped Africa: 250% engagement increase, serving 500,000+ people across 8 African countries
- Binns Media Group: Complete platform redesign with measurable engagement and load time improvements
- Chad Le Clos Swimming: Olympic champion's clinic site drove numerous sign-ups within days
- AutoMarginX: Real-time analytics platform enabling 35% faster dealer decisions
